projectDescription: Left-Sided Studios is an independent game development collective with a public-facing web hub showcasing original titles, subsidiary labels, studio news, and an AI-powered chatbot assistant.
keyFeatures: Dynamic project catalog with status tracking (In Development, Released, Paused, Canceled)
Studio network page listing subsidiary labels (ANdE, Gotch-ya, Bomb Banana, Endgame, Skullix)
News and blog system with public/private post visibility
AI-powered chatbot (Google Gemini) for studio Q&A
Dark/light mode with high-contrast accessibility toggle
Global search modal with type and genre filtering
Press kit with downloadable brand assets
Netlify-hosted with Redis-backed session management and Netlify Functions
publicApiSurface: GET / — Home page with hero carousel, project spotlight, and team section
GET /about — Studio philosophy, mission, timeline, ecosystem tree, FAQ, and press kit
GET /games — Main projects catalog filtered to LSS-developer titles
GET /games/:id — Individual game detail with full description, roadmap, and gallery
GET /series/:id — Media series detail (e.g., FNaF: On the Clock)
GET /network — Studio network listing subsidiaries and partners
GET /news — Blog/news listing with public post filter
GET /news/:id — Full blog post view with related games
